mapper.select:
SELECT c.id, c.title, c.category, c.price, c.cover_url, c.status, c.created_at, c.teacher_id, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) AS teacher_name, COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(cv.duration) FROM course_video cv JOIN course_chapter cc ON cv.chapter_id = cc.id WHERE cc.course_id = c.id), 0 ) AS total_duration, COALESCE( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_chapter cc WHERE cc.course_id = c.id), 0 ) AS chapter_count,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course_order co WHERE co.course_id = c.id AND co.student_id = #{currentUserId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_purchased
FALSE AS is_purchased
FROM course c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE 1=1
AND c.status = #{status}
AND c.category = #{category}
AND (c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC

SELECT c.id, c.title, c.category, c.price, c.cover_url, c.status, c.created_at, c.teacher_id, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username) AS teacher_name, COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(cv.duration) FROM course_video cv JOIN course_chapter cc ON cv.chapter_id = cc.id WHERE cc.course_id = c.id), 0 ) AS total_duration, COALESCE( (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM course_chapter cc WHERE cc.course_id = c.id), 0 ) AS chapter_count,
CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM course_order co WHERE co.course_id = c.id AND co.student_id = #{currentUserId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_purchased
FALSE AS is_purchased
FROM course c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.teacher_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{courseId}
